candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue label; identical values to Total Revenue and appears to be the primary revenue line.
Explicit total revenue label; identical to Turnover and suitable as fallback if label changes by year.
Selling/distribution cost, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Sales freight & Travel, marketing and vehicle expenses
candidates.why: Expense aggregation, not revenue.
Explicitly non-revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code can take the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Direct production/input purchase cost and best available COGS-style candidate, though it is blank in 2025 and may not fully reflect reported cost of sales across all years.

candidates.row_label: Purchases during the period - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing item, not a primary reporting line.

variables.notes: Candidate list appears to miss the more semantically correct COGS-style row. 'Use of Materials and Supplies' is a better direct-cost label than 'Purchases during the period' and appears to be the main cost-of-sales-type line in historical years, but this requires manual review because it was chosen outside the candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Use of Materials and Supplies

candidates.why: Clear SG&A-type overhead component.
Personnel/overhead expense and strong SG&A component candidate, subject to some possible manufacturing labor inclusion.
Generic overhead bucket and appropriate when no explicit populated SG&A total exists.

candidates.row_label: Sales freight & Travel, marketing and vehicle expenses
candidates.why: Combined overhead/distribution bucket, but appears unpopulated and less preferable than the more specific component row.
Explicit SG&A labor component by name, but appears unpopulated in preview.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row is shown. Selected overhead component/bucket rows and excluded COGS, D&A, impairments, and totals/subtotals.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the provided Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance-expense line that can serve as fallback when a specific interest-expense line is unavailable.
Best direct match for interest expense and preferred primary mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrower lease-specific component; not preferred over general interest expense.
Too broad and may include non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct interest-expense concept, but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and lease-specific; not preferred as main interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Using a priority list headed by the most specific interest-expense label, with broader finance expense as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance-sheet book equity.
Not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Reserve for invested unrestricted equity fund
candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best available balance-sheet total equity line; no separate parent-equity/NCI split is shown.
Balancing item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No separate owner/parent equity line is visible on the balance sheet, so Total Equity is used for BE. Consistent with the equity rule, MIB is set to [] to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is visible on the provided Balance Sheet preview.
